summary: Iteration 2 — Fase 4 (Core Business Layer + Salon Creation + AI Visual Hooks). Tested via Playwright against the live Supabase-backed app. Signup → onboarding → create-salon → salon-overview flow works end-to-end. AI Logo Modal opens with all 4 styles (minimal/glam/natural/luxury) and 6 palettes (magenta/azure/sage/nude/noir/rose) plus generate/cancel/close buttons. Auto-slug generation works. SalonOnboardingGate correctly routes salon_owner without salon_id to /onboarding/salon. Mobile (390) has no horizontal overflow on /salon nor /app/vision. CRITICAL BUG: after a hard navigation (page reload) to any authed sub-route (/salon/services, /salon/products, /app/vision) the FullScreenLoader ([data-testid='app-loading']) NEVER disappears within 10-20 s — i.e. AuthContext.loading stays true and the 12-s failsafe described in the spec does not appear to be firing reliably after rehydration. Because the loader is permanent, ProtectedRoute never gets to evaluate role → a client account can therefore *appear* to sit on /salon/services without being redirected to /unauthorized (URL stays put while the spinner is on screen).

ui_bugs.issue: After hard-reload navigation (page.goto) to /salon/services, /salon/products or /app/vision the FullScreenLoader stays on screen indefinitely (>20s). The 12-s failsafe documented for AuthContext does not appear to release `loading` on rehydration. The salon-overview path works on first redirect after onboarding (in-app SPA navigation), but reloads of /salon/* sub-routes get stuck.

A client account that navigates directly to /salon/services stays on /salon/services (URL never redirects to /unauthorized) because the app is stuck in FullScreenLoader; ProtectedRoute can only run after loading=false. Once the loader bug is fixed this should be re-verified.

No data-testid attributes detected on mobile bottom nav or top bar (searched for testids containing 'bottom', 'nav', 'top'). Spec asks for 5 client + 6 salon nav items to be present and testable. Add data-testid='bottom-nav', 'bottom-nav-{key}', 'top-bar' to enable the spec's nav coverage.

integration_issues.flow: Service CRUD / Product CRUD / Vision upload
integration_issues.issue: Could not exercise CRUD or selfie upload because /salon/services, /salon/products and /app/vision never render their page testids — they remain at [data-testid='app-loading']. Once the loader bug is fixed these flows need to be retested end-to-end (create service, edit, toggle is_active, delete; create product with category/recommended_for; selfie upload → processing → result).

action_items: FIX (highest priority): investigate why AuthContext.loading does not resolve within 12 s after a hard reload of /salon/services, /salon/products or /app/vision. Possible causes: (a) `getSession()` + `getProfile()` chain awaits forever when called on a deep-link route, (b) the documented 12-s failsafe is gated on a flag that is reset on every effect run, (c) profile fetch hangs because RLS denies and the supabase client retries silently. Add a hard timeout (setTimeout(() => setLoading(false), 12000)) at mount and confirm it always fires.
Add data-testid='bottom-nav', 'bottom-nav-{key}', 'top-bar' on the mobile shell so the 5/6 nav-item coverage from the spec is testable.

After loader fix, re-run /salon/services CRUD, /salon/products CRUD (note: products.category + recommended_for columns require migration 0003 to be applied — if not applied yet, the friendly Spanish error path needs verification) and /app/vision selfie upload → processing → mocked result.
Re-verify ProtectedRoute → /unauthorized redirect for client→/salon/* once loader resolves.
critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext failsafe: the 12-s timeout to force loading=false must run on every effect that toggles loading, not only on initial mount. After page reload to a deep-link route, if getSession() never resolves the user is trapped forever in FullScreenLoader.

OnboardingSalon submit → navigate('/salon', { replace:true }) works because it is an SPA transition (no reload). But any subsequent F5 / direct URL hit on /salon/* triggers the bug. This is the same root cause as the client-block regression.
Mobile nav components miss data-testid — add them to be in line with the rest of the codebase which already tags interactive elements.

Spec calls for friendly Spanish error when products.category column or storage buckets are missing (migration 0003 not yet applied). Could not validate because /salon/products is stuck behind FullScreenLoader; needs re-test after loader fix to confirm the error surfaces via [data-testid='products-error'].

success_rate.frontend: 8/13 verified PASS (signup salon_owner, onboarding elements, auto-slug, AI logo modal opens, create salon without logo, salon overview render, mobile no-overflow on /salon, mobile no-overflow on /app/vision, SalonOnboardingGate). 5 BLOCKED by the FullScreenLoader bug on hard-nav (services CRUD, products CRUD, vision upload, client→/salon block, mobile bottom-nav coverage).

test_credentials: Fresh signups created in Supabase: test_salon_<rand>@roomie.test / Roomie2026! (salon_owner) and test_client_<rand>@roomie.test / Roomie2026! (client). Confirm-email is OFF so sessions are immediate.
seed_data_creation: Two fresh Supabase auth users and one salon row ('Aurora Beauty Lab QA' / slug 'aurora-beauty-lab-qa') were created via the real signup + create_my_salon RPC. No backend seed touched (FastAPI only exposes /api/health).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onboarding + AI Logo Modal + create-salon path is solid. The blocker is AuthContext rehydration on deep-link reloads — once that is fixed, re-run: (1) /salon/services full CRUD (create with category 'nails', toggle, edit pre-fill, delete), (2) /salon/products create with recommended_for comma-split (this will fail with friendly ES error if migration 0003 not applied — verify the [data-testid='products-error'] copy reads as Spanish), (3) /app/vision selfie upload → step 'processing' → step 'result' with mocked proposal, (4) /salon/services with a client account → expect redirect to /unauthorized, (5) mobile 5 client + 6 salon bottom-nav items (need data-testid added by E1 first). AI Logo Modal real-upload to Storage is gated on migration 0003 buckets being created — if not, expect a friendly Spanish error inside the modal, not a crash.
rca of the issue: Symptom: navigating directly (page reload) to /salon/services, /salon/products or /app/vision shows the FullScreenLoader spinner indefinitely (>20s); same routes load instantly when reached via in-app SPA navigation from /salon. Reproduction: signup salon_owner → onboarding → /salon (works) → page.goto('/salon/services') → spinner forever. Likely cause: AuthContext does an async getSession()+getProfile() chain on mount and `loading` is gated on completion. The 12-s failsafe described in the spec is either missing in the effect cleanup path or guarded by a stale closure. Mitigation: add an unconditional `setTimeout(() => setLoading(false), 12000)` registered once at mount, cleared if the chain resolves earlier — ensures the loader can never trap the user.
